paths.reflect-metadata: turnover uses standard TC39 decorators only — never reflect-metadata, emitDecoratorMetadata, or design-type reflection. See coding-best-practices.md §2.
paths.@opentelemetry/api: Optional peer dependency — import only inside src/otel.ts (the turnover/otel subpath), never the core. See coding-best-practices.md §3.2.
paths.@opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base: The OpenTelemetry SDK is a dev/test-only dependency — never import it in src/; the framework depends solely on the stable @opentelemetry/api. See coding-best-practices.md §3.2.
paths.@opentelemetry/context-async-hooks: The OpenTelemetry SDK is a dev/test-only dependency — never import it in src/. See coding-best-practices.md §3.2.
paths.@opentelemetry/core: The OpenTelemetry SDK is a dev/test-only dependency — never import it in src/. See coding-best-practices.md §3.2.

paths.reflect-metadata: turnover uses standard TC39 decorators only. See coding-best-practices.md §2.
paths.@opentelemetry/sdk-trace-base: src/otel.ts depends solely on the stable @opentelemetry/api — never the SDK. See coding-best-practices.md §3.2.
paths.@opentelemetry/context-async-hooks: src/otel.ts depends solely on the stable @opentelemetry/api — never the SDK. See coding-best-practices.md §3.2.
paths.@opentelemetry/core: src/otel.ts depends solely on the stable @opentelemetry/api — never the SDK. See coding-best-practices.md §3.2.

paths.reflect-metadata: turnover uses standard TC39 decorators only — tests included. See coding-best-practices.md §2.
